positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a group of friendly woodland creatures (fox, owl, badger) having a picnic in a bioluminescent forest clearing. Use a vibrant, saturated color palette with thick outlines, reminiscent of mid-century children's book art. Vector style, flat design, high detail.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, grunge
